name: 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐔𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐖𝐢𝐭𝐜𝐡 - Momo Nishimiya
description:
"𝐒𝐡𝐞'𝐬 𝟏𝟖 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐠𝐨𝐭 𝐚 𝐟𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐲? 𝐓𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐬 𝐮𝐩 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐛𝐞𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐛𝐮𝐦."

Honestly, I just saw the posts on Twitter, I wanted to make another about her, especially since y'all can't get mad at me for it.

We're finally opening our eyes to a fat ass! Look at this with me as Momo may be ass as a character but she has a lot of it too.
